zh.lifeSummary: John Bentley於1545年出生在英國艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。他於1569年10月3日與Mary Gawton在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1577年11月16日在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特享年32歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Bentley于1545年出生在英国艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。他于1569年10月3日与Mary Gawton在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1577年11月16日在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特享年32岁，埋葬在英国英格兰艾可貝盧哈普 沃爾特。

nameMeanings.name: Bentley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places, the chief of which are in Derbyshire, Essex, Hampshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and East and South Yorkshire. The placename is from Old English beonet ‘bent grass’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
In some cases also an Americanized form of South German Bentele or of its Swiss German or South German cognates Bandle and Bandli.

variants.name: Bently
meanings: Variant of   Bentley   2, a surname of South German or Swiss German origin.

variants.name: Bentele
meanings: South German: from a short form of the personal name Pantaleon (see Pantaleo ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: John Bentley was born in 1545, in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England. He married Mary Gawton on 3 October 1569, in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 16 November 1577, in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32, and was buried in Belchamp Walter, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: John Bentley est né en 1545, à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mary Gawton le 3 octobre 1569, à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 16 novembre 1577, à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans, et a été enterré à Belchamp Walter, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bentleyは1545年にイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターで生まれた。1569年10月3日にイギリスイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターでMary Gawtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1577年11月16日にイギリスイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターで32歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ ワルターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bentley(은)는 1545년 영국 에세스 벨챔프 월터에서 태어났다. 그는 1569년 10월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 월터에서 Mary Gawton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1577년 11월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 월터에서 32세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 벨챔프 월터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: John Bentley родился в 1545 г. в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Gawton 3 октября 1569 г. в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 16 ноября 1577 г. в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет и был похоронен в местности белчамп валтир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
